title: Cooks, Fast Food
description: Prepare and cook food in a fast food restaurant with a limited menu. Duties of these cooks are limited to preparation of a few basic items and normally involve operating large-volume single-purpose cooking equipment.

tasks.text: Order and take delivery of supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cook the exact number of items ordered by each customer, working on several different orders simultaneously.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare specialty foods, such as pizzas, fish and chips, sandwiches, or tacos, following specific methods that usually require short preparation time.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate large-volume cooking equipment, such as grills, deep-fat fryers, or griddles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wash, cut, and prepare foods designated for cooking.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and serve beverages, such as coffee or fountain drinks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean food preparation areas, cooking surfaces, and utensils.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read food order slips or receive verbal instructions as to food required by patron, and prepare and cook food according to instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve orders to customers at windows, counters, or tables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, stock, and restock workstations and display cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain sanitation, health, and safety standards in work areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cook and package batches of food, such as hamburgers or fried chicken, prepared to order or kept warm until sold.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take food and drink orders and receive payment from customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify that prepared food meets requirements for quality and quantity.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pre-cook items, such as bacon, to prepare them for later use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure ingredients required for specific food items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix ingredients, such as pancake or waffle batters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule activities and equipment use with managers, using information about daily menus to help coordinate cooking times.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
